Projects.title: > ls ~/projects --showcase
Projects.bmw_desc: This project was born from my desire to explore and practice Scrollytelling — a technique that uses scrolling to drive cinematic animations and tell stories on the web. To bring this concept to life, I chose the BMW X6 M Competition as the theme, using the car's design and power as the perfect canvas to create an immersive and visually striking experience. The result is a premium landing page where each scroll reveals a new detail of the vehicle, from its aggressive exterior to its high-performance engine.
